title: An Act to amend the operations of the city of Boston Finance Commission to establish the Boston Inspector General Oversight Commission

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Worrell of Boston, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 4924) of Christopher J. Worrell (with the approval of the mayor and city council) that the city of Boston be authorized to establish the Boston inspector general oversight commission.  Municipalities and Regional Government.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Municipalities and Regional Government

related_entities.name: committee on Municipalities and Regional Government

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 03/03/2026 from 01:00 PM-03:00 PM in 222
Hearing rescheduled to 03/03/2026 from 01:00 PM-01:30 PM in 222            and Virtual Hearing updated to New End Time
Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling

related_entities.name: the committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling
committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling

actions.description: Committee reported that the matter be placed in the Orders of the Day for the next sitting
Read second and ordered to a third reading
